title: kitchenkit
tagline: A Discord-native kitchen management toolkit for small food operations.
description: kitchenkit brings kitchen workflows directly into Discord — shift scheduling, prep checklists, supplier contact lists, and daily briefings — all managed through slash commands in a server your team already uses.
story: Small food trucks and pop-up kitchens can't afford enterprise software. Most of their team communication already lives in Discord. kitchenkit meets them where they are, turning a Discord server into a fully functional operations hub.
forWho: Food truck operators, catering teams, and pop-up kitchen crews who run lean and already live in Discord.

detailedSpecs.architecture: Single-process Discord bot with a command handler registry. SQLite stores per-guild configuration and schedule data locally.
keyPatterns: Dynamic slash command registration per guild
Per-guild isolated data via guild_id scoping in SQLite
detailedSpecs.apiSurface: Discord Gateway API (slash commands, embeds, DM notifications)
